mapper.insert: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.insertMcpRequestSelfDlvryHist*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_SELF_DLVRY_HIST@DL_CAN ( SELF_DLVRY_IDX, USIM_PROD_ID, USIM_PROD_DTL_ID, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, ONLINE_AUTH_DI, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_MEMO, SELF_MEMO, REQ_USIM_SN, DLVRY_STATE_CODE, SELF_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, TB_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, CRET_ID, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, SYS_RDATE, REQ_BUY_QNTY, USIM_UCOST, USIM_PRICE, DLVRY_TYPE, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, TRNS_DTTM ) SELECT SELF_DLVRY_IDX, USIM_PROD_ID, USIM_PROD_DTL_ID, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, ONLINE_AUTH_DI, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_MEMO, SELF_MEMO, REQ_USIM_SN, DLVRY_STATE_CODE, SELF_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, TB_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, CRET_ID, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, SYS_RDATE, REQ_BUY_QNTY, USIM_UCOST, USIM_PRICE, DLVRY_TYPE, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_SELF_DLVRY_HIST@DL_MCP WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx}
mapper.update: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.updateMcpRequestSelfDlvryHist*/ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_SELF_DLVRY_HIST@DL_MCP SET CSTMR_NAME = CASE WHEN CSTMR_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN = CASE WHEN CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN #{cstmrNativeRrn} ELSE '' END ,ONLINE_AUTH_DI = '' ,DLVRY_NAME = CASE WHEN DLVRY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_FN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_FN IS NOT NULL THEN '000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_RN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_RN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_ADDR = SUBSTR(DLVRY_ADDR, 1, 15) ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME = CASE WHEN MINOR_AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,TRNS_YN = 'Y' WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx}
mapper.insert: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.insertMcpRequestSelfDlvry*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_SELF_DLVRY@DL_CAN ( SELF_DLVRY_IDX, USIM_PROD_ID, USIM_PROD_DTL_ID, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, ONLINE_AUTH_DI, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_MEMO, SELF_MEMO, REQ_USIM_SN, DLVRY_STATE_CODE, SELF_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, TB_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, CRET_ID, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, SYS_RDATE, VIEW_YN, REQ_BUY_QNTY, USIM_UCOST, USIM_PRICE, DLVRY_TYPE, REQ_TYPE, REQUEST_KEY, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, TRNS_DTTM ) SELECT SELF_DLVRY_IDX, USIM_PROD_ID, USIM_PROD_DTL_ID, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, ONLINE_AUTH_DI, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_MEMO, SELF_MEMO, REQ_USIM_SN, DLVRY_STATE_CODE, SELF_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, TB_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, CRET_ID, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, SYS_RDATE, VIEW_YN, REQ_BUY_QNTY, USIM_UCOST, USIM_PRICE, DLVRY_TYPE, REQ_TYPE, REQUEST_KEY, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_SELF_DLVRY@DL_MCP A WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MCP_REQUEST_SELF_DLVRY@DL_CAN WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = A.SELF_DLVRY_IDX)
mapper.update: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.updateMcpRequestSelfDlvry*/ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_SELF_DLVRY@DL_MCP SET CSTMR_NAME = CASE WHEN CSTMR_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN = CASE WHEN CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN #{cstmrNativeRrn} ELSE '' END ,ONLINE_AUTH_DI = '' ,DLVRY_NAME = CASE WHEN DLVRY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_FN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_FN IS NOT NULL THEN '000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_RN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_RN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_ADDR = SUBSTR(DLVRY_ADDR, 1, 15) ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME = CASE WHEN MINOR_AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,TRNS_YN = 'Y' WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx}
mapper.insert: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.insertNmcpDaouPayInfo*/ INSERT INTO NMCP_DAOUPAY_INFO@DL_CAN ( PAYMETHOD, CPID, DAOUTRX, AMOUNT, ORDERNO, SETTDATE, AUTHNO, EMAIL, CARDCODE, CARDNAME, USERID, USERNAME, PRODUCTCODE, PRODUCTNAME, CARDNO, RESERVEDINDEX1, RESERVEDINDEX2, RESERVEDSTRING, CRET_DT, MENU, CNCL_RST_CD, CNCL_FAIL_CD, CNCL_FAIL_RSN, CNCL_ID, CNCL_DT, TRNS_DTTM ) SELECT PAYMETHOD, CPID, DAOUTRX, AMOUNT, ORDERNO, SETTDATE, AUTHNO, EMAIL, CARDCODE, CARDNAME, USERID, USERNAME, PRODUCTCODE, PRODUCTNAME, CARDNO, RESERVEDINDEX1, RESERVEDINDEX2, RESERVEDSTRING, CRET_DT, MENU, CNCL_RST_CD, CNCL_FAIL_CD, CNCL_FAIL_RSN, CNCL_ID, CNCL_DT, SYSDATE FROM NMCP_DAOUPAY_INFO@DL_MCP WHERE ORDERNO = TO_CHAR(#{selfDlvryIdx})
mapper.update: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.updateNmcpDaouPayInfo*/ UPDATE NMCP_DAOUPAY_INFO@DL_MCP SET EMAIL = '' ,USERNAME = CASE WHEN USERNAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,CARDNO = '' WHERE ORDERNO = TO_CHAR(#{selfDlvryIdx})
mapper.insert: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.insertMcpRequestNowDlvryHist*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY_HIST@DL_CAN ( SELF_DLVRY_IDX, KT_ORD_ID, BIZ_ORG_CD, DELIVERY_ORDER_ID, USIM_AMT, USIM_PROD_ID, USIM_PROD_DTL_ID, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, ONLINE_AUTH_DI, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_MEMO, SELF_MEMO, REQ_USIM_SN, DLVRY_STATE_CODE, SELF_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, TB_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, SVC_RSLT_CD, SVC_RSLT_MSG, PAY_CD, CRET_ID, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, SYS_RDATE, ACCEPT_TIME, DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR, DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR_DTL, ENTY, ENTX, HOMEPW, REQ_TYPE, REQUEST_KEY, ORDER_REQ_MSG, REQ_BUY_QNTY, USIM_UCOST, DLVRY_TYPE, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, TRNS_DTTM ) SELECT SELF_DLVRY_IDX, KT_ORD_ID, BIZ_ORG_CD, DELIVERY_ORDER_ID, USIM_AMT, USIM_PROD_ID, USIM_PROD_DTL_ID, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, ONLINE_AUTH_DI, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_MEMO, SELF_MEMO, REQ_USIM_SN, DLVRY_STATE_CODE, SELF_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, TB_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, SVC_RSLT_CD, SVC_RSLT_MSG, PAY_CD, CRET_ID, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, SYS_RDATE, ACCEPT_TIME, DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR, DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR_DTL, ENTY, ENTX, HOMEPW, REQ_TYPE, REQUEST_KEY, ORDER_REQ_MSG, REQ_BUY_QNTY, USIM_UCOST, DLVRY_TYPE, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY_HIST@DL_MCP WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx}
mapper.update: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.updateMcpRequestNowDlvryHist*/ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY_HIST@DL_MCP SET CSTMR_NAME = CASE WHEN CSTMR_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN = CASE WHEN CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN #{cstmrNativeRrn} ELSE '' END ,ONLINE_AUTH_DI = '' ,DLVRY_NAME = CASE WHEN DLVRY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_FN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_FN IS NOT NULL THEN '000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_RN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_RN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_ADDR = SUBSTR(DLVRY_ADDR, 1, 15) ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL = '' ,DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR = SUBSTR(DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR, 1, 15) ,DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR_DTL = '' ,ENTY = '' ,ENTX = '' ,HOMEPW = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME = CASE WHEN MINOR_AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,TRNS_YN = 'Y' WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx}
mapper.insert: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.insertMcpRequestNowDlvry*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY@DL_CAN ( SELF_DLVRY_IDX, KT_ORD_ID, BIZ_ORG_CD, DELIVERY_ORDER_ID, USIM_AMT, USIM_PROD_ID, USIM_PROD_DTL_ID, CSTMR_NAME,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, ONLINE_AUTH_DI, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN,DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_MEMO, SELF_MEMO, REQ_USIM_SN, DLVRY_STATE_CODE, SELF_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, TB_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, SVC_RSLT_CD, SVC_RSLT_MSG, PAY_CD, CRET_ID, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, SYS_RDATE, ACCEPT_TIME, ORDER_STAT_RSN_DESC, VIEW_YN, DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR, DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR_DTL, ENTY, ENTX, HOMEPW, REQ_TYPE, REQUEST_KEY, ORDER_REQ_MSG, REQ_BUY_QNTY, USIM_UCOST, DLVRY_TYPE, RE_BIZ_ORG_CD, RE_ACCEPT_YN, ORDER_STAT_CD, CHANNEL_CD, CUST_INFO_AGREE_YN, RSV_ORDER_YN, RSV_ORDER_DT, UNTACT, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, TRNS_DTTM ) SELECT SELF_DLVRY_IDX, KT_ORD_ID, BIZ_ORG_CD, DELIVERY_ORDER_ID, USIM_AMT, USIM_PROD_ID, USIM_PROD_DTL_ID, CSTMR_NAME,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, ONLINE_AUTH_DI, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN,DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_MEMO, SELF_MEMO, REQ_USIM_SN, DLVRY_STATE_CODE, SELF_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, TB_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, SVC_RSLT_CD, SVC_RSLT_MSG, PAY_CD, CRET_ID, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, SYS_RDATE, ACCEPT_TIME, ORDER_STAT_RSN_DESC, VIEW_YN, DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR, DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR_DTL, ENTY, ENTX, HOMEPW, REQ_TYPE, REQUEST_KEY, ORDER_REQ_MSG, REQ_BUY_QNTY, USIM_UCOST, DLVRY_TYPE, RE_BIZ_ORG_CD, RE_ACCEPT_YN, ORDER_STAT_CD, CHANNEL_CD, CUST_INFO_AGREE_YN, RSV_ORDER_YN, RSV_ORDER_DT, UNTACT, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx}
mapper.update: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.updateMcpRequestNowDlvry*/ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY@DL_MCP SET CSTMR_NAME = CASE WHEN CSTMR_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN = CASE WHEN CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN #{cstmrNativeRrn} ELSE '' END ,ONLINE_AUTH_DI = '' ,DLVRY_NAME = CASE WHEN DLVRY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_FN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_FN IS NOT NULL THEN '000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_TEL_RN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_RN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END ,DLVRY_ADDR = SUBSTR(DLVRY_ADDR, 1, 15) ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL = '' ,DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR = SUBSTR(DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR, 1, 15) ,DLVRY_JIBUN_ADDR_DTL = '' ,ENTY = '' ,ENTX = '' ,HOMEPW = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME = CASE WHEN MINOR_AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END ,TRNS_YN = 'Y' WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx}
mapper.delete: /*UsimDlvryCanMapper.deleteNmcpDaouPayInfoCan*/ DELETE FROM NMCP_DAOUPAY_INFO@DL_CAN WHERE ORDERNO = TO_CHAR(#{selfDlvryIdx})
/*UsimDlvryCanMapper.deleteNmcpDaouPayInfo*/ DELETE FROM NMCP_DAOUPAY_INFO@DL_MCP WHERE ORDERNO = TO_CHAR(#{selfDlvryIdx})
